title: Global Wakili — Module Findings: Documents + Client/Matter + Search
subtitle: Read-only investigation · 2 July 2026 · Verified against source (no assumptions)

blocks.text: Backend routes exposed: POST / (upload, SINGLE file), GET /search, GET /dashboard, GET /:id, GET /:id/download (presigns on-demand), DELETE /:id (archive), POST /:id/restore. The gaps are frontend + a signed-URL flow issue:

rows: BROKEN — /search does NOT presign per row; d.signedUrl null → buttons hidden / 'No file URL'

blocks.text: Highest-impact fix: on Preview/Download click, call GET /:id/download to obtain the signed URL (do not rely on d.signedUrl from the list). Then add Delete/Restore buttons wired to the existing endpoints.
Report: 'pick a client, their matters don't display, and vice versa.' Traced against source:

items: Client-detail Matters tab: GET /matters?clientId=X — server-side filter IS supported (listOpenMatters + query schema allow clientId).
Forms (billing/new etc.): filter client-side on (m.client?.id ?? m.clientId); shapeMatterResponse spreads ...matter so m.clientId IS present in list rows.
Conclusion: the linkage MECHANISM exists. A global break is not evident in code.
Most likely: a SPECIFIC screen, or a limit=100/30 cap hiding a client's matters, or matter creation not persisting clientId in one path.
ACTION: needs a live repro to name the exact screen before fixing — do NOT guess-fix. Ref v3 spec 03-matters.
(a) AUDIT-PATHMISMATCH — FIXED (7e4d409): documents/approvals/ai/reporting search called GET /resource (404) instead of GET /resource/search. Now corrected.
(b) STILL OPEN — 400 param bugs: tax VAT (needs month), WHT (needs from/to), tasks/search validation (TAX-002 class). These fail until FE params align with backend schema.
Net: 'works for some, not others' = the mix of path-mismatch (now fixed) + param bugs (open). Re-verify per module after Vercel deploy.

blocks.text: AUDIT-PATHMISMATCH fixed across 5 modules (commit 7e4d409): ai/artifacts→/search, approvals/requests→/search (+ approve/reject /:id), documents→/search, reporting/runs→/runs/search, reception/logs→/search (+ CALL→CALL_LOG). Residual: reception docs tabs have no backend GET (SCOPE-RECEPTION-DOCS); documentType filter unsupported (DOC-TYPE-FILTER). web tsc exit 0; live re-verify pending deploy.
